title: lonicera × americana var. atrosanguinea
intro: Lonicera × americana var. atrosanguinea is a hybrid variety of the honeysuckle plant, known for its vibrant red and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lonicera × americana var. atrosanguinea include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
